creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text: I didn't save the log, from memory, the problem with skia is the missing getauxval implementation on FreeBSD/aarch64 and the problem with rust/libc is that 'char' is unsigned on aarch64 (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/lang/rust/files/patch-src_liblibc_src_unix_bsd_freebsdlike_freebsd_aarch64.rs?revision=474978&view=markup)
